title: hieracium marginale
intro: Hieracium marginale, also known as Hawkweed or Orange Hawk's Beard, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Hieracium marginale include its ability to stimulate circulation, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
